reliabilityChanges: Whisper, Gemma, and MiniLM initialization uses correlated generation IDs with inactivity and absolute deadlines.
Progress can extend only the inactivity timer; it cannot keep model preparation alive past the absolute deadline.
Initialization timeout, error, crash, or synchronous start failure rejects dependent work, persists a visible Retry state, terminates the old worker, and installs a clean replacement.
Late replies from a superseded generation are ignored; saved audio/checkpoints, deterministic summaries, and hydrated lexical search remain authoritative fallbacks.
Cached Whisper re-warm remains connected to bounded automatic transcription resume until ready or terminal failure.
Launch-time native speech and Android decoder capability probes end within five seconds; a stalled native speech probe starts bounded Whisper fallback preparation.

focusedCoverage: retry generation supersedes late prior replies
outstanding worker requests reject on crash
saved transcription and intelligence fallback invariants

ios.knownHostGate: Xcode 26.3 cannot mount the developer disk image for the paired iOS 26.5.2 iPhone.

qualificationBoundary: Build and fault-injection evidence does not prove model timeout/replacement under physical mobile suspension or memory pressure, locked 60/120-minute recording, real saved-audio transcription, interruption recovery, or destination-app receipt.
